title: Maximum equipment weight
text: The equipment shall be of a maximum weight of 4kg

title: Maximum equipment size
text: The equipment shall be of a maximum size of 400mm x 300mm x 100mm

title: Electrical connector type
text: The equipment shall operate only with two MIL-DTL-38999 Series III Connectors as electrical connectors. One for power, the other for data and configuration

title: Mechanical interface specification
text: The equipment shall have the following mechanical interface: 4 AN3-5A Bolts, in a flat square of 150mm, with the center of the square being the center of the equipment

title: HMI LED configuration
text: The equipment shall have 3 colored LED (red, green, yellow) as a Human Machine Interface (HMI)

title: HMI LED status patterns
text: The equipment HMI shall follow this pattern: yellow at startup, blinking yellow when in configuration mode from maintenance personnel, blinking red when internal error is found, red when external error is found, blinking green when on standby, green when armed (monitoring is on-going with no issue), alternating blinking green then yellow when monitoring is going and thresholds are detected and equipment has cut power on engine

title: Standby pin on external connector
text: The equipment shall have a standby input pin on the external connector

title: Engine power on/off pin on external connector
text: The equipment shall have an engine_power_on_off output pin on the external connector

title: Standby mode activation
text: When the standby pin is at GND level, the equipment shall enter the standby mode

title: Monitoring mode activation
text: When the standby pin is at High level, the equipment shall enter the monitoring mode

title: Analog signal monitoring specification
text: When on monitoring mode, the equipment shall monitor 2 analog signals, both ranging from 0V to 24V

title: Default threshold and hysteresis values
text: The equipment shall define default threshold values and hysteresis values for each signal as follows: Threshold 1 at 10V with hysteresis at 9V, Threshold 2 at 20V with hysteresis at 18V

title: Threshold breach engine power cut-off
text: When any threshold is exceeded, the equipment shall cut the power on the engine by setting the engine_power_on_off pin to High

title: Engine power restoration condition
text: The equipment shall set the engine_power_on_off pin back to Low only when both signals are below their respective hysteresis values

title: Internal software reprogramming
text: The equipment controller's software shall be fully reprogrammable through internal connector only available after opening the case

title: External connector reprogramming restriction
text: The equipment controller shall not be reprogrammable from the external connectors

title: Configuration port on external connector
text: The equipment shall have a configuration port on the external connector dedicated for data and configuration communication

title: Configuration port communication capability
text: The configuration port shall communicate with the controller software to reprogram non-volatile data

title: Maintenance reconfiguration capability
text: The equipment shall allow the maintenance team to reconfigure the 2 thresholds and 2 hysteresis values through the equipment controller software

title: Part Number and Serial Number sticker
text: The equipment shall have a PN/SN (Part Number/Serial Number) sticker on its case

title: PN/SN availability through configuration port
text: The equipment shall have the PN/SN (Part Number/Serial Number) available for the maintenance team to read from the controller configuration port
